# Default Inputs

Use these defaults when the user does not provide explicit paths:

- Task document: GraduationProjectTasks.md
- Outline document: Mid-termInspection.md
- Polished output: Mid-termInspection_result.md

Look for evidence in:

- requirements.txt
- agents/
- acps_aip/
- tests/
- scripts/
- services/
- top-level project docs
